side_effects.description: Itchy extremities first then whole body, throat closing up, labored breathing

protocol_notes: Had taken 3 different peptides in 3 pins on first occasion; suspected interaction. Tried Sermorelin alone weeks later and had the same reaction, confirming Sermorelin as the cause. No prior allergies in nearly 50 years. Treated with Benadryl. Recommends always having a plan, not panicking, and not being alone for first use of a new peptide.
